prestazioni: Replace the stock 1GR-FSE 4.0L V6 (320hp) with a fully built 1GR-FSE featuring a forged internals kit from Tomei (pistons, connecting rods, crankshaft) and a custom billet crankshaft from HKS, paired with a Garrett GTX4202R turbocharger (1.06 A/R turbine housing) and a GReddy Type-S intercooler for sustained 650whp on E85 fuel with a Motec M150 ECU managing the standalone fuel and ignition maps.

Install a custom 3.5-inch titanium exhaust system by Fujitsubo Legalis R with a straight-pipe design and a secondary catalytic converter delete, utilizing a custom 4-2-1 header setup from Jun Auto for optimized scavenging and a Tomei 80mm titanium exhaust tip for weight reduction and acoustic tuning.

Upgrade the stock 6-speed manual transmission with a Holinger RD6 sequential gearbox (dog-ring engagement) and a Sachs twin-disc carbon clutch, paired with a Cusco 2-way limited-slip differential (1.5-way preload) and a custom aluminum driveshaft from Driveshaft Shop to handle the increased torque.
estetica: Install a full Rocket Bunny V3 widebody kit (GRMN-specific fender flares, front bumper, and rear diffuser) with custom carbon fiber overfenders by Seibon, painted in Toyota Racing Development (TRD) Heritage Red (040) with a matte black roof and mirror caps.

Replace the stock GRMN wheels with a set of custom BBS LM-R 18x9.5 +22 front and 18x10.5 +30 rear (ET22/ET30) in gold finish, wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (245/35/18 front, 275/30/18 rear) for track-focused grip, paired with AP Racing CP8640 brake calipers and 380mm two-piece rotors up front.

Add a custom carbon fiber GT wing by Voltex (Type 7, 1700mm width, 300mm height) with adjustable aluminum pedestals, paired with a custom front splitter by Varis (carbon fiber, 3-stage adjustable) and a rear diffuser by APR Performance (carbon fiber, 3-piece design with integrated brake ducts).
